name: codebase-design
description: Shared vocabulary for designing deep modules with small interfaces at clean seams. Use when designing or improving module interfaces, or deciding where seams go.

name: diagnose
description: Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions. Reproduce, minimise, hypothesise, instrument, fix, regression-test.

name: dispatch-issues
description: Orchestrate issue slices from .docs/issues/ to TDD sub-agents in dependency order, driving issue backlogs to completion wave by wave.

name: domain-modeling
description: Build and sharpen a project's domain model, pin down terminology, and record architectural decisions as they crystallise.

name: frontend-design
description: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design when building new UI or reshaping an existing one. Helps with aesthetic direction, typography, and choices that don't read as templated defaults.

name: grill-with-docs
description: Grilling session that challenges your plan against the existing domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates documentation inline.

name: improve-codebase-architecture
description: Find deepening opportunities in a codebase to improve architecture, consolidate tightly-coupled modules, and enhance testability.

name: prototype
description: Build a throwaway prototype to flesh out a design before committing to it, supporting both logic/state-model and UI variation branches.

name: tdd
description: Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop, emphasizing behavior verification through public interfaces.

name: to-issues
description: Break a plan, spec, or PRD into independently-grabbable issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices.

name: to-prd
description: Turn the current conversation context into a PRD and save to .docs/prd/.

name: update-atlas
description: Generate or incrementally update a multi-file project atlas (atlas/ directory) for large codebases — INDEX.md with module tree plus per-module detail files.

name: update-memory
description: Generate or incrementally update a CODEBASE.md project overview for AI model consumption — architecture, modules, dependencies, and data flow.

name: webapp-testing
description: Toolkit for testing local web applications using Playwright. Verify frontend functionality, debug UI behavior, capture screenshots, and view browser logs.

name: docx
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents (.docx files) with professional formatting, tables of contents, headings, and page numbers.

name: pdf
description: Read, extract, combine, split, rotate, watermark, create, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, and OCR PDF files.

name: pptx
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate PowerPoint presentations (.pptx files), including slide decks, templates, layouts, and speaker notes.

name: xlsx
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate spreadsheet files (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv) with support for financial models, charts, formulas, and data cleaning.

name: brainstorming
description: Collaborative design process that explores intent, requirements and constraints through questions, proposes approaches, and produces a validated design spec before implementation.

name: caveman
description: Ultra-compressed communication mode that cuts token usage ~75% by dropping filler while keeping full technical accuracy.

name: doc-coauthoring
description: Structured three-stage workflow for co-authoring documentation: context gathering, iterative refinement, and reader testing to catch blind spots.

name: grill-me
description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree.

name: handoff
description: Compact the current conversation into a handoff document so a fresh agent can continue the work seamlessly.

name: mcp-builder
description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services, supporting Python (FastMCP) and Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).

name: skill-creator
description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance with evals and benchmarks.

name: teach
description: Teach the user a new skill or concept within a structured teaching workspace with missions, lessons, and learning records.

name: setup-kilians-skills
description: Install skills from Kilian's collection into global or project-level Claude skills directories via symbolic links.

name: write-a-skill
description: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources.

name: writing-plans
description: Write comprehensive implementation plans from specs or requirements, with bite-sized TDD tasks, exact file paths, complete code, and testing commands.
